description_long: This is a vintage Philips record player with a sleek, rectangular body and two detachable, perforated orange speakers that flank the main unit. The main chassis is predominantly black with a metallic control panel featuring sliders and switches, as well as a circular turntable platter with a central spindle. The tonearm is positioned to the right of the platter, resting in its cradle, and appears to be made of metal or plastic with a matte finish. The speakers have a distinctive grid pattern on their front faces and are attached to the sides of the main unit, with visible mounting hardware on the back. The overall design is compact and portable, with a retro aesthetic typical of mid-20th-century audio equipment. The materials suggest a combination of plastic, metal, and electronic components, with a glossy and smooth surface finish.
description: A retro Philips record player with a black body, metallic controls, and two bright orange, perforated speakers. The design is compact, portable, and visually striking with a mix of glossy and matte finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the record player, the turntable platter, control panel, and both orange speakers with their perforated fronts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the unit, the thickness of the speakers, and the profile of the control panel and tonearm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the orange speakers, their mounting hardware, and the partially obscured turntable platter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the record player, the tonearm, and the edge of the control panel.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and centrally located on the main body. It is black with a silver spindle in the center and appears to be made of plastic or metal. The platter is slightly raised and occupies about one-third of the main unit's surface. There are no visible grooves or patterns, but the surface is smooth and glossy.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, positioned to the right of the platter, and appears to be of medium length with a straight shape. It is made of metal or plastic, colored black, and has a matte finish. The tonearm is resting in its cradle, not raised or positioned over the platter.
attribute_control_knobs: There are several control sliders and switches located on the right side of the main unit, adjacent to the platter. These controls are rectangular, made of plastic or metal, and are black with silver or white markings. No round knobs are visible, but the sliders and switches are clearly labeled and designed for tactile interaction.
